name: G-4 migrate-rubric: multiple rules whose provenance.source resolves to the same namespace/file are grouped into one source-organized file
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    provenance:
      - source: google-tsguide
  - id: g-ts-002
    provenance:
      - source: google-tsguide
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -f out/google/tsguide.yaml ] && grep -c 'id: g-ts-' out/google/tsguide.yaml | grep -q '^2$' && echo grouped 1>&2
